content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 24, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 24, 2026, focused on hardening the ElizaOS framework across Web2 and Web3 ecosystems. Key achievements include significant advancements in on-device vision and computer-use capabilities, robust cloud infrastructure improvements for multi-tenant security, and a comprehensive audit-driven effort to eliminate "LARP" (vacuous) tests, ensuring high-integrity regression coverage for core agent actions and LifeOps workflows.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**On-Device Vision & Computer Use**
*   Enabled end-to-end Android screen-understanding loops on Pixel 9a, integrating screen capture with local vision models ([#9356](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9356)).
*   Shipped native, zero-token Tesseract OCR for Linux and Android, and enabled token-by-token streaming of image descriptions and transcriptions directly into the chat pipe ([#9453](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9453), [#9512](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9512), [#9289](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9289)).
*   Exposed computer-use capabilities to external MCP clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor) and fixed Windows-specific path/CLI probe bugs ([#9247](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9247), [#9421](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9421)).

**Cloud Infrastructure & Security Hardening**
*   Implemented critical security isolation for untrusted app builds and fixed cross-tenant ingress bypasses by binding app host ports to loopback ([#9230](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9230), [#9229](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9229)).
*   Added hard CPU/swap caps and per-org container quotas to prevent DoS attacks in multi-tenant environments ([#9220](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9220)).
*   Deployed a periodic orphan app-container reconciler to clean up leaked resources from failed deployments ([#9234](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9234)).

**Testing Integrity & Audit-Driven Refactoring**
*   Executed a repo-wide audit to replace vacuous tests with load-bearing assertions, specifically hardening LifeOps scenarios and cross-device todo/calendar workflows ([#9312](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9312), [#9418](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9418)).
*   Implemented a type-safety ratchet to enforce strict TypeScript standards and eliminate `any` usage in leaf plugins ([#9474](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9474), [#9521](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9521)).
*   Consolidated duplicated utility helpers and removed over 600 junk macOS AppleDouble files to improve repository hygiene ([#9504](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9504), [#9468](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9468)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9523](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9523): fix(ui): type injected companion globals.
*   [#9492](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9492): test(browser): machine-checkable CUA-parity matrix + drift/ratchet guard.
*   [#9490](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9490): fix(vision): include OCR text in scene prompt.
*   [#9483](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9483): chore(ui): declutter plugin app view surfaces.
*   [#9479](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9479): chore(env): remove dead env-var aliases.
*   [#9469](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9469): fix(core): add canonical activity plaintext serializers.
*   [#9467](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9467): fix: correctness + observability bugs.
*   [#9412](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9412): test(ui-chat): shared inline-widget-context + WIDGET_MATRIX.
*   [#9411](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9411): test(scenario-runner): assert global alarm persistence.
*   [#9408](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9408): test(scenario-runner): assert global alarm proof.
*   [#9407](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9407): test(scenario-runner): assert todo prioritize result.
*   [#9376](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9376): test(ui): cover chat inline marker parsers.
*   [#9375](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9375): fix(scenario-runner): seed connector degradation.
*   [#9370](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9370): fix(cloud): harden auto top-up credit persist.
*   [#9367](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9367) through [#9360](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9360): Various scenario-runner final-check and fix PRs.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No specific issues were marked as closed in the provided activity log.*
